findings.title: No rate limiting on API routes
findings.description: POST /api/sessions performs two sequential DB queries and lacks rate limiting.
findings.impact: Authenticated users could rapidly create sessions or enumerate workspaces.
findings.suggestion: Add rate limiting middleware (e.g., Upstash Ratelimit) on POST endpoints.

findings.title: PATCH /api/workspaces/[id] silently ignores execution_domain updates
findings.description: execution_domain in request body is silently ignored. Behavior matches DB trigger but is implicit.
findings.impact: No functional impact; could confuse API consumers.
findings.suggestion: Add explicit comment or reject with 400 if provided.

findings.title: No input length limits on user-controlled text fields
findings.description: name and description lack length validation in POST handler.
findings.impact: Excessively long strings could cause storage/display issues.
findings.suggestion: Add CHECK constraints in DB or length validation in API handler.

fixes_applied_during_review.title: Session PATCH missing ownership check
fixes_applied_during_review.fix: Added workspace ownership verification before update + status enum validation

fixes_applied_during_review.title: GET /api/sessions missing workspace ownership check
fixes_applied_during_review.fix: Added workspace ownership verification query before session listing

fixes_applied_during_review.title: Session PATCH accepts arbitrary status value
fixes_applied_during_review.fix: Added enum validation: only 'active' and 'archived' accepted

fixes_applied_during_review.title: Workspace PATCH allows empty name
fixes_applied_during_review.fix: Added name validation: must be non-empty string, max 200 chars
